parsed.production_notes: The video is primarily a live-action, human-recorded scene. The shot of the AI teacher on the phone is a static, professional photograph inserted into a phone mockup, not an AI-generated video.

characters.appearance: A South Indian man in his late 20s or early 30s with a medium build and a dusky complexion. He has short, curly black hair, a well-groomed beard and mustache, and prominent facial features. He has a friendly and inquisitive expression.
characters.wardrobe: A blue and white vertically striped button-down shirt with the sleeves rolled up, paired with light blue jeans. He wears a watch on his left wrist.
characters.demeanor: Curious, impressed, and engaged in the conversation.

characters.appearance: A South Indian woman in her mid-to-late 20s with a slender build and a fair complexion. She has long, straight black hair parted to the side. Her facial features are soft, and she has a bright, expressive smile.
characters.wardrobe: A green and yellow printed salwar kameez with a sheer, patterned green dupatta draped over her shoulders.
characters.demeanor: Initially polite and slightly reserved, she becomes confident, enthusiastic, and persuasive when talking about her experience.

characters.appearance: A South Indian man in his late 20s or early 30s with a slim build and a light-to-medium complexion. He has thick, wavy black hair and a short, neat beard. He has a gentle and supportive look.
characters.wardrobe: A plain, short-sleeved white t-shirt and light-colored, possibly cream or off-white, striped trousers.
characters.demeanor: Supportive, encouraging, and proud of his partner.

characters.appearance: A woman in her 30s with a fair complexion, long, dark, wavy hair, and professionally styled makeup. She has a warm, professional smile and appears poised and confident.
characters.wardrobe: A dark navy blue blazer over a white top.

scenes.setting: A modern, well-lit living room during the day. The walls have a beige, textured wallpaper. A wooden coffee table is in the center, and a TV console is visible in the background. The color palette is warm with neutral tones.
scenes.camera: A series of medium shots and over-the-shoulder shots, cutting between the characters.

panels.panel_visual_description: Three friends, two men and one woman, are having a conversation in a living room. Character A, seen from the front, sits casually on a chair, holding a dark mug and asking a question. The shot then cuts to an over-the-shoulder view from behind Character A, showing Character B and Character C sitting together. Character C, in a white shirt, gestures towards Character B, who is dressed in green, encouraging her to speak. Character B smiles and begins to tell a story.

scenes.visual_description: The scene opens with three friends (A, B, C) in a living room. Character A asks a question, and the subtitles appear on screen. The camera cuts between him and the couple (B and C). Character C encourages Character B to answer, and she begins her story with a smile. Subtitles translate the dialogue throughout.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: Wait, you two were in the same college? Tell me the whole story.
Character C says: Are, he is asking something.
Character B says: Actually, it's a funny story. We met through our parents, as they were long time friends.

you two were in the same college?

he is asking something.
Actually, it's a funny story.

scenes.setting: The same living room as the previous scene.
scenes.camera: Medium shots, cutting between the characters as they speak.

panels.panel_visual_description: In a living room, Character A looks impressed and leans forward slightly, complimenting Character B. The camera then cuts to Character B, who smiles and responds confidently. Her partner, Character C, sitting beside her, looks at her with a curious and admiring expression before asking her a question. The three are seated around a wooden coffee table with mugs on it.

scenes.visual_description: Character A compliments Character B on her English, speaking in Tamil. Character B responds in Tamil, and then Character C asks her in English where she learned it. The conversation flows naturally, with subtitles appearing for each line.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: Unga English romba super-ah irukke. Tamil medium nu sonnare? [Your English is very super. He said you were from a Tamil medium school?]
Character B says: Naan Tamil medium dhaan. Aana adhu enna stop pannala. [I am from a Tamil medium school. But that didn't stop me.]
Character C says: Where did you learn such good English?
scenes.on_screen_text:
Unga English
Tamil medium
nu sonnare?
Naan Tamil medium
Aana adhu enna
stop pannala.
Where did you learn
such good English?

scenes.setting: The living room, with a digital phone screen appearing as an inset.
scenes.camera: Medium shot of the group, with a graphic of a phone appearing over the scene.

panels.panel_visual_description: In the living room, Character B is speaking to Character A and Character C. She has a confident expression as she explains where she learned English. Her hands are clasped in her lap.

A smartphone is shown against a plain white background. On the screen, there is a professional headshot of Character D, a smiling woman in a dark blazer. She is holding a small, orange, puzzle-piece-like object in her hands.

scenes.visual_description: As Character B begins to explain, a phone mockup appears on screen, showing the app's AI teacher (Character D) and the SpeakX logo. The logo and text overlays appear on both the living room scene and the phone screen. The scene then cuts back to the living room as she finishes her sentence.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character B says: SpeakX app la, oru AI teacher irundhanga. Avanga kooda pesi dhaan naan English kathukitten. [In the SpeakX app, there was an AI teacher. I learned English by speaking with her.]
scenes.on_screen_text:
SpeakX
SpeakX app la,
oru AI teacher
Avanga kooda
English kathukitten.

scenes.camera: Medium shots and close-ups on Character B as she speaks enthusiastically.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character B speaks with growing confidence and enthusiasm, using hand gestures to emphasize her points. She looks directly at Character A. Character C listens intently, smiling, while Character A looks intrigued. The focus remains on Character B as she passionately describes her positive experience and encourages her friends.

scenes.visual_description: Character B explains the benefits of the app, mentioning that the AI teacher didn't judge her and that she learned quickly. She then directly recommends the app to her friends. The SpeakX logo appears again briefly. Subtitles continue to translate her Tamil speech.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character B says: Ennoda mistakes ku avanga sirikkala, judge-um pannala. Rende vaarathula Hollywood level English kathu kuduthanga. Naan ippo enga venaalum, confident-ah English pesuven. Pecha kelunga, neengalum SpeakX app download pannunga. Yaarku theriyum, promotion kooda kedaikkalam. [She didn't laugh at my mistakes, nor did she judge. In just two weeks, she taught me Hollywood-level English. Now I can speak English confidently anywhere. Listen to me, you also download the SpeakX app. Who knows, you might even get a promotion.]

scenes.setting: A digital app interface against a white background.
scenes.camera: Static graphic of a phone screen.

panels.panel_visual_description: A close-up shot of a smartphone screen. The screen displays a clean, modern app interface with a white background and orange accents. There are several list items with small icons next to them, detailing features. At the bottom of the screen is a large orange button.

scenes.visual_description: The final scene is an end-card showing the SpeakX app's premium trial page. Text on the screen lists features like 'Learn with Personal AI Mentor', 'Unlock Unlimited Exercises', '100+ Real Life Scenarios', and 'Get Personalized Feedback'. A countdown timer is shown above a large orange button that says 'Start 7 Days Trial Now'.
